quote: With Lord Corlys came his wife, Princess Rhaenys
the greatest lord to pledge his strength to the princess

text: Grand Maester Orwyle sat on the green council and opened it by reviewing the customary rites for a dead king
His confessions before execution underlie Munkun's history, though he wrote to absolve himself
Grand Maester Munkun wrote The Dance of the Dragons, A True Telling, the most detailed account, though composed a generation later and relying on Orwyle
In his telling Criston Cole cut Beesbury's throat
Corlys Velaryon of Driftmark, the Sea Snake, grown old, was the greatest lord to pledge his strength to Rhaenyra
He grumbled but smiled that the three boys were Velaryons
